message:
fix(platform): gate Unix socket and SSH imports behind cfg(unix)

Continues the cross-platform compilation work from f7ce265. Three
remaining files used Unix-only APIs without platform guards:

- rch/src/commands/config_doctor.rs: The daemon status check calls
  std::os::unix::net::UnixStream::connect which doesn't exist on Windows.
  Wrap the entire socket-check block in #[cfg(unix)] with a #[cfg(not(unix))]
  fallback that emits an informational diagnostic explaining the skip.

- rch/src/commands/workers.rs: SshClient and SshOptions imports are
  Unix-only; gate them behind #[cfg(unix)].

- rch/src/transfer.rs: Same SshClient/SshOptions import gating.

- rch/src/commands/helpers.rs: Add PlatformError to the error import
  list to support platform-specific error variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
